prompt: A minimalist cinematic night scene of a massive warm terracotta stucco wall filling the frame, viewed straight on in perfect symmetry. The wall has a crenellated top edge silhouetted against a deep black sky, and at the exact center near the bottom is a single small Moorish keyhole-shaped doorway, its interior completely black. A narrow warm spotlight from above creates a soft vertical cone of light down the middle of the wall, brightest around the doorway and fading upward and outward, with a gentle pool of light on the ground. The foreground is a flat stone or plaster courtyard in shadow with subtle texture. No people, no furniture, no decoration, no text. Emphasize negative space, geometric simplicity, architectural stillness, rich earthy tones, high contrast, soft ambient falloff, ultra-clean composition, photorealistic texture, and a calm contemplative mood, in a wide cinematic aspect ratio.
